subject: Your beta ask could convert harder
text:
Hey — saw the r/SaaS post for translayer.io. The layout-preserving translator is a strong hook, but I think the leak is probably the first 10 seconds before someone gets why this beats "just upload it somewhere else."

If you want, I can help tighten the homepage into a single ugly-file → proof → signup path, or just reply and I’ll send a quick teardown. If easier, start at https://meetrick.ai.
